World Conflicts.title: UK PM Burnham: ‘We need to be a cost-of-living government’
World Conflicts.summary: At his first cabinet meeting as UK prime minister, Burnham told ministers they must be a "cost-of-living government".

World Conflicts.title: Russian warship carried out firing exercise off Plymouth coast
World Conflicts.summary: The Neustrashimy's live-fire exercise took place in international waters and lasted for 30 minutes.

World Conflicts.title: FIFA ‘destroying football’ for the World Cup, says Spanish football chief
World Conflicts.summary: In a scathing interview, La Liga President Javier Tebas says FIFA chief Gianni Infantino’s time is 'over'.

World Conflicts.title: Israel has ‘no interest’ in joining US war on Iran, says Smotrich
World Conflicts.summary: Israeli Finance Minister says Israel has "no interest" in joining the renewed US military campaign against Iran.
